notes: Carousel positioning fix (was top-left in v0.4.1 because backdrop went into Game/Node2D where anchors don't work — moved to menu_layer/CanvasLayer). Arena overhauled: walls are now procedurally generated at random positions every spawn (no more 5-layout cycle); always-on rotating laser at center REMOVED, replaced by temporary rotating lasers spawning at random off-center positions on drops + key changes (6-9s lifetime each); new burst-trap hazard fires on drops, high-energy zones, and every other phrase — telegraphed shockwave then 8-bullet ring outward from a random point. Wall colors track the current musical key.
